name: Enchiladas (Red Chili)
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the corn tortillas in deep fat until softened.
2. Dip each tortilla into the red chili sauce.
3. Place a soaked tortilla on an oven-safe plate.
4. Sprinkle grated cheddar cheese and chopped onion over the tortilla.
5. Cover with more red chili sauce, then place another tortilla on top.
6. Repeat steps 4-5 until all tortillas are used.
7. Pour enough chili sauce over the assembled layers to cover them completely.
8. Serve three tortillas as one serving.
9. Place a fried egg on top of each enchilada (optional).
